title: change-map
description: Repo-local coupling table consumed by the check-drift skill. Lists what must move together in one PR. Skill logic is generic; this table is per-repo config.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the coupling.

trigger.description: Human description of the change that fires this coupling.

ssot.description: Optional source-of-truth file whose change signals this coupling fired.

must_update.description: Paths or globs that must move in the same PR when this coupling fires.

revalidate.description: Optional commands or lanes to re-run (a moved file can still be semantically stale).

notes.description: Optional free-form caveats (e.g. a load-bearing pin).
